text: Abstract The research of the abstract autonomous agent is a hot spot in the academic and industry circles. Most researches train the agents with a small amount of background knowledge in a simple environment, which is quite different from the way human beings learn, and it is very difficult for the agents to make decisions in a human-like way. Recently, by learning a large amount of Web knowledge, large language models (LLMs) have gained great success in achieving the human level of intelligence and many researchers pay more and more attention to the autonomous agents based on LLMs. This paper provides a comprehensive survey on the related researches, gives a systematic summary on the autonomous agents based on LLMs from the overall angle, and discusses their constructions based on the new perspective. In addition, the paper provides a summary of the current achievements and applications of LLM-based autonomous agents in social science, natural science and engineering. Finally, the evaluation methods for LLM-based autonomous agents are given. Some future works and challenges are also discussed in this paper.
explanation: The text is a generic, well-structured abstract with some slightly awkward phrasing that can occur in AI-generated content. The style is consistent with machine-generated abstracts, but it could also be human-written, so the verdict is uncertain.
